name: 04_hardbreak-mid-paragraph
description:
Mixed line-break shapes: 'line one
line two

new paragraph'. In the Rebel composer's wire format every '
' is a paragraph separator (markdownToDoc splits on '
'); the doubled '

' produces an empty paragraph between content paragraphs. Exercises serialisation parity for stacked breaks.
input:
line one
line two

new paragraph
expectedSanitised:
line one
line two

new paragraph
